name: Minimum Exempt Amount for Wages and Salary

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must submit a verified statement specifying the number of dependents to the IRS to ensure the correct exempt amount is calculated.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Ensures a portion of a taxpayer's wages or salary is exempt from levy to cover basic living expenses, calculated based on the standard deduction and number of dependents.
